svg.title: Altogether Agile horizontal lockup - tight wordmark variant
svg.desc: Horizontal lockup with the hanko mark on the left and the tight wordmark (ALTOGETHERAGILE on a single line, no space between words) on the right. Vertically centred. For headers, email signatures, and compact contexts.

text.font-family: 'Hiragino Sans', 'Yu Gothic', 'Noto Sans CJK JP', sans-serif
